title: Ferri 2015 artificial emotional looming sounds
citation: Ferri, F., Costantini, M., Tajadura-Jimenez, A., Valjamae, A., & Vastano, R. (2015). Emotion-inducing approaching sounds shape the boundaries of multisensory peripersonal space. Neuropsychologia, 70, 468-475.
notes: Captures the Canzoneri-style frontal audio-tactile scaffold and artificial 1/f versus 1/f2 looming sound labels. Exact emotional stimulus construction and ratings require the paper materials.

provenance.source: UCL Discovery abstract reports intensity-changing artificial sound sources with neutral or negative valence.
The profile reuses the Canzoneri-style five-point looming PPS scaffold because the exact sound files/envelopes are not bundled.
